sources.title: Tuesday 2008 Dvdrip
sources.description: What happens when 3 groups of people decide to rob the same bank on the same day?

metadata.Plot: Jim is a recent quadriplegic whose only contact with the outside world is his carer and wife, Meg. During bath-time one day, Jim finds himself alone - trapped in the bath and his own useless body. Will Jim ever be found when his anger at the world has alienated himself from it?
metadata.Actors: Louise Quill, Steve Young, Steve Young
